name: EP50 Single Speed Pump
desc: 0.5 HP self-priming pump for pools up to 40,000L. Corrosion-resistant housing.

name: EP75 Single Speed Pump
desc: 0.75 HP centrifugal pump. High-flow impeller, pre-filter basket.

name: E-Power Variable Speed Pump
desc: Up to 80% energy savings vs single speed. Digital display control.

name: WLP Centrifugal Pump
desc: 0.75 HP high-performance plastic pump. Salt water compatible.

name: Astral Viron P320 XT Pump
desc: Variable speed pump with EcoStar technology. Significant energy savings for residential pools.

name: Minder Automatic Pool Cleaner
desc: Robotic pool cleaner. Cleans floor, walls and waterline. 3hr cycle, top-load filter basket.

name: Astral Viron eQuilibrium
desc: 25g/hr salt chlorinator with intelligent pH and ORP dosing.

name: Minder Digital Pool Thermometer
desc: Wireless digital pool thermometer. Floating sensor with remote display.
